reviews.review_description: Pls add custom mapmaking, would be so good
Android app is missing in Play Store, so don't buy this game if you don't own an iPhone.

Motion Sickness is pretty bad with this game for some reason.
The tutorial is REALLY unnessecarily long for no reason when the game is 95% selfexplanitory and somehow it doesnt explain the needed 5% well :/

Playing the Hacker Part (on Phone) is really fun, me and my gf both enjoyed it more (to our surprise)
We played lv 1&2 and were disappointed that it was pretty much the same puzzles. Might try again on some of the other levels to see if there is more variety

Overall a cool concept but needs some work.

reviews.review_title: Fun but obviously a few bugs
reviews.review_description: Everything is great except for one thing the hacker role on the Mobile app constantly kicks you out of the game and then you have to start the level you were all over again other than that though this is a really fun game to play with a friend or two.

reviews.review_title: We need more games like this!
reviews.review_description:
The experience was really fun! Mechanics are really simple but I love this games were we don't need everyone to have a VR gear while still both sides have fun. It offers me something unique I didnt have and thats why Im giving It 5*
Would love more of this and more mechanics being added!
Also the mods on their discord are really fast and helpful, check It out!

23h. Saturday.
 Last 4 survivors from this double birthday were sitting outside "on air". We are getting sleepy and bored.
I am taking out my headset! 
Passing my phone to my friend with the phrase:" DO YOU COPY?" 😉, while putting the glasses. 
This was the best 2 h. co op game with 3 hackers and one robber!!!! 
I hope there will be support and updates.
P.s. everyone who is wearing my Quest, has passed at least 1 "First steps "
A great asymmetric experience! It was an interesting test of communication between me and my partner. I particularly liked the minigames, and looking forward to seeing more levels and mechanics!

Unique experience that was still quite flawed when I played it. If you like asymmetric multiplayer, it's definitely worth a try. Lots of potential and it'll continue to improve.

Get it for 25% off with this link (remove the spaces).  www.ocul. us /3kWXbn5
I love asymmetric VR games and this is one of the best I've played. If this is early access I cannot wait for the full release!  Keep up the great work!

reviews.review_title: Love the concept! The coop is dope!
reviews.review_description: I played with 2 friends at the game, we laughed a lot playing it! I love the way we have to communicate together to progress in the level. I hope it will have other updates to add more levels!

This game is a unique VR experience. You can play with your friends as a party game or with someone Talking over Discord. If you want 25% off use this Link and scroll down to Do U Copy?

bio.link/questgames
A new and fun take on co-op asymmetrical games, and you can easily play with your friends that are on pc or mobile. Plus the soundtrack is an utter bop

I enjoyed playing with a friend but the interactions between thief and hacker become repetitive fast. The game is definitely worth it at the launch price but it feels clunky in several aspects. I hope to see this grow as the concept is great and usability issues can be fixed. Creating more ‘puzzle’ diversity requires more work, though.

love the idea of the game, we might just be dumb but trying to play through the tutorial with the family and none of us can figure out the simon says part, would be a lot of fun if we could figure out how to get past that part
